component.name: Popyachsa AirPlay
component.summary: AirPlay receiver — mirror iPhone, iPad or Mac to your screen

description.p: A low-latency AirPlay receiver. Mirror your iPhone, iPad or Mac, or stream video, photos and music, straight to this computer over your local Wi-Fi.

ul.li: Low-latency screen mirroring with hardware H.264 / H.265 decode (VA-API or NVDEC)
Direct HLS playback for YouTube, Photos, Safari and Apple TV+ video
Auto screen-orientation tracking; window adapts to the picture aspect
A tiny tray app — 16 languages, no accounts, no telemetry

description.p: Cross-platform release: Linux build, settings and self-update.
